SELECT MAX(Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)) AS HighestEligibleFreeRate FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School Name, Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17) FROM frpm WHERE School Type LIKE '%Continuation%' ORDER BY Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17) ASC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Zip  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE f.County Name = 'Fresno' AND f.Charter School (Y/N) = '1'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.MailStreet  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  ORDER BY f.FRPM Count (K-12) DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone  FROM schools  WHERE Charter = 1 AND FundingType = 'Directly funded' AND OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE AvgScrMath > 400 AND Virtual = 'P'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.District, s.County FROM schools s JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds WHERE sc.NumTstTakr > 500 AND s.Magnet = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 > 0)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(s.NumTstTakr) AS TotalTestTakers FROM satscores s JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode WHERE f.FRPM Count (K-12) = (SELECT MAX(FRPM Count (K-12)) FROM frpm)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DirectlyCharterFundedSchools FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE AvgScrMath > 560 AND schools.FundingType = 'Directly funded'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f.FRPM_Count_Ages_5_17 FROM frpm f JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.CDSCode  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE f.Enrollment_K_12 > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX(Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)) AS HighestEligibleFreeRate FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode IN (     SELECT cds     FROM satscores     WHERE (NumTstTakr * 1.0 / enroll12) > 0.3 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode ORDER BY (ss.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / ss.NumTstTakr) DESC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f.School_Code, f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17 FROM frpm f ORDER BY f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17 DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT dname, AVG(AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.StatusType = 'Active' GROUP BY dname ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS MergedSchoolsLessThan100TestTakers FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.StatusType = 'Merged' AND s.County = 'Alameda' AND sa.NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.CharterNum, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE sa.AvgScrWrite > 499 GROUP BY s.CharterNum ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Fresno'  AND f.Charter Funding Type = 'Directly funded'  AND sa.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT cds      FROM satscores      ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Amador' AND Low Grade = '9' AND High Grade = '12'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'    AND Free Meal Count (K-12) > 500    AND FRPM Count (K-12) < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, MAX(sa.NumTstTakr) AS MaxTestTakers FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.County = 'Contra Costa' GROUP BY s.School ORDER BY MaxTestTakers DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.Street, s.City, s.Zip FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE ABS(f.Enrollment_K_12 - f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f.School Name  FROM frpm f  JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds  WHERE f.Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) > 0.1  AND s.NumTstTakr > 0  AND s.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.FundingType  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds  WHERE s.City = 'Riverside' AND sc.AvgScrMath > 400	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School AS School_Name,         s.MailStreet AS Street,         s.MailCity AS City,         s.MailState AS State,         s.MailZip AS Zip FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Monterey'    AND f.Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) > 800    AND s.SOCType = 'High Schools (Public)'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore, s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') GROUP BY s.School, s.Phone	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.Charter Funding Type = 'Locally funded'  AND (f.Enrollment (K-12) - f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) > (     SELECT AVG(f2.Enrollment (K-12) - f2.Enrollment (Ages 5-17))     FROM frpm f2     WHERE f2.Charter Funding Type = 'Locally funded' )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT OpenDate  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM frpm      WHERE LowGrade = '1' AND HighGrade = '12'      ORDER BY Enrollment (K-12) DESC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, SUM(Enrollment (K-12)) AS TotalEnrollment FROM frpm GROUP BY City ORDER BY TotalEnrollment ASC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)  FROM frpm  ORDER BY Enrollment (K-12) DESC  LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT SchoolName,         PercentEligibleFreeK12,         FRPMCountK12  FROM (SELECT f.School Name,               f.Percent(%) Eligible Free (K-12) AS PercentEligibleFreeK12,               f.FRPM Count (K-12) AS FRPMCountK12        FROM frpm f        JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode        WHERE s.SOC = '66'          AND f.LowGrade >= '1'          AND f.HighGrade <= '12'        ORDER BY f.FRPM Count (K-12) DESC        LIMIT 5)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Website  FROM frpm  WHERE Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      f.Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)  FROM      frpm f  JOIN      schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE      s.AdmFName1 = 'Kacey' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Gibson'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM frpm      WHERE Charter School (Y/N) = 1      ORDER BY Enrollment (K-12) ASC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1 AS FullName FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE ss.NumGE1500 = (     SELECT MAX(NumGE1500)     FROM satscores )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Street, City, Zip, State  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT cds      FROM satscores      ORDER BY AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite ASC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'  AND sa.NumTstTakr BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31' AND schools.County = 'Fresno'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Phone  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds                    FROM satscores                    WHERE dname = 'Fresno Unified'                    ORDER BY AvgScrRead                    LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.County FROM schools s JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds WHERE s.Virtual = 'Y' ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT f.Educational Option Type  FROM satscores s  JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode  WHERE s.AvgScrMath = (SELECT MAX(AvgScrMath) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath) AS AverageMathScore, s.County FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE ss.AvgScrRead = (SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead) FROM satscores)    OR ss.AvgScrMath = (SELECT MIN(AvgScrMath) FROM satscores)    OR ss.AvgScrWrite = (SELECT MIN(AvgScrWrite) FROM satscores) GROUP BY s.County	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM satscores sa JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (     SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)     FROM satscores     WHERE NumGE1500 > 0 ) GROUP BY s.City	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT f.SchoolName, f.Enrollment_K12 FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.SchoolType = 'State Special Schools' ORDER BY f.Enrollment_K12 DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OpenDate) AS Month, COUNT(*) AS AverageOpenedSchools FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda'    AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%'   AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980' GROUP BY Month	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*)       FROM schools       WHERE StatusType = 'Merged'         AND County = 'Orange'         AND DistrictType = 'Unified School District') * 1.0 /     (SELECT COUNT(*)       FROM schools       WHERE StatusType = 'Merged'         AND County = 'Orange'         AND DistrictType = 'Elementary School District') AS Ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate  FROM schools  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'  GROUP BY County  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Street, City, Zip, State  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT cds      FROM satscores      ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC      LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6 )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School, MailStreet  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds                   FROM satscores                   ORDER BY AvgScrRead                   LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalSchools FROM schools s JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds WHERE s.MailCity = 'Lakeport' AND (sc.AvgScrRead + sc.AvgScrMath + sc.AvgScrWrite) >= 1500	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS TotalTestTakers FROM satscores WHERE cds IN (     SELECT CDSCode     FROM schools     WHERE MailCity = 'Fresno' )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, MailZip  FROM schools  WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Avetik' AND AdmLName1 = 'Atoian'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND County = 'Colusa') * 1.0 /     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND County = 'Humboldt') AS Ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE State = 'CA' AND City = 'San Joaquin' AND StatusType = 'Active'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone, Ext  FROM schools  JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds  ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC  LIMIT 1 OFFSET 332	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Phone, Ext FROM schools WHERE Zip = '95203-3704'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website  FROM schools s  WHERE (s.AdmFName1 = 'Mike' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Larson')     OR (s.AdmFName1 = 'Dante' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Alvarez')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website  FROM schools  WHERE Virtual = 'P' AND Charter = 1 AND County = 'San Joaquin'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE City = 'Hickman'  AND Charter = 1  AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalNonCharteredSchools FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'   AND Charter School (Y/N) = '0'   AND Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) < 0.0018	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.City,         COALESCE(s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1, '') AS Admin1,         COALESCE(s.AdmFName2 || ' ' || s.AdmLName2, '') AS Admin2,         COALESCE(s.AdmFName3 || ' ' || s.AdmLName3, '') AS Admin3 FROM schools s WHERE s.Charter = 1 AND s.CharterNum = '00D2'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalSchools FROM schools WHERE MailCity = 'Hickman' AND CharterNum = '00D4'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (COUNT(CASE WHEN f.Charter Funding Type = 'Locally funded' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Locally_Funded_Percentage FROM      frpm f JOIN      schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE      s.County = 'Santa Clara'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE OpenDate BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31'  AND County = 'Stanislaus'  AND FundingType = 'Directly funded'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalClosures FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND City = 'San Francisco' AND strftime('%Y', ClosedDate) = '1989'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS ClosureCount FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31' AND DOCType = 'Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)' GROUP BY County ORDER BY ClosureCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT NCESDist FROM schools WHERE DOCType = 'State Special Schools'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT StatusType, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alpine' AND StatusType IN ('Active', 'Closed') AND School LIKE '%Community Day School%' GROUP BY StatusType	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT District Code FROM schools WHERE City = 'Fresno' AND Magnet = 0	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT SUM(Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) AS Total_Enrollment_Ages_5_to_17 FROM frpm WHERE School Name = 'California School for the Deaf-Fremont (State Special Schl)'  AND Academic Year = '2014-2015'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT FRPMCountAges5To17 FROM frpm WHERE EducationalOptionType LIKE 'Youth Authority School' AND MailStreet = 'PO Box 1040'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT LowGrade  FROM frpm  WHERE District Code = '0613360' AND School Type = 'Special Education Consortia School'  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, f.Educational Option Type  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f.NSLP Provision Status = 'Breakfast Provision 2' AND f.County Code = '37'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE f.NSLP_Provision_Status = 'Provision 2'    AND f.Low_Grade = '9'    AND f.High_Grade = '12'    AND s.County = 'Merced'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, f."Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)" FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.LowGrade = 'K' AND f.HighGrade = '9' AND f.County Name = 'Los Angeles'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSserved, COUNT(*) as Count FROM schools WHERE City = 'Adelanto' GROUP BY GSserved ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE Virtual = 'P' AND County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') GROUP BY County ORDER BY SchoolCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Latitude, SchoolType  FROM schools  WHERE Latitude = (SELECT MAX(Latitude) FROM schools)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, School, LowGrade  FROM schools  WHERE State = 'CA'  ORDER BY Latitude ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSoffered  FROM schools  WHERE Longitude = (SELECT MAX(Longitude) FROM schools)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE GSserved = 'K-8' AND Magnet = 1 GROUP BY City	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmFName1 AS FirstName, District, COUNT(*) AS NameCount FROM schools GROUP BY AdmFName1, District ORDER BY NameCount DESC LIMIT 2	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", s."District"  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine' OR s.AdmFName2 = 'Alusine' OR s.AdmFName3 = 'Alusine'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmLName1, District, County, School  FROM schools  WHERE CharterNum = '40'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'    AND City = 'San Bernardino'    AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'    AND (SchoolType LIKE '%Intermediate%' OR SchoolType LIKE '%Unified%')    AND StatusType = 'Active'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.AdmEmail1 FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (     SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)     FROM satscores     WHERE NumGE1500 > 0 ) AND sa.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
